body.title: Response coherence gate — detect template/parrot before sending
body.result: Coherence gate in main.py: greeting-pattern responses suppressed after turn 1. Falls through to LLM instead. Habit logging wrapped in if-guard to prevent NoneType crash on suppression. 1880 tests pass. Note: deeper issue (LLM projecting stale context onto input) is addressed by D330 TWM context builder.
body.description: Igor generates canned greeting responses mid-conversation (turn 3 parrot). D332 blocks storage but user still sees the bad response. Need: pre-send check that detects template collapse (repeated greeting, topic discontinuity, loss of conversational thread). Could be rule-based (greeting keywords after turn 1) or lightweight LLM check. The echo filter catches storage; this catches generation.
